channel.title: Manusha's Daily Drive
channel.description: A personalized daily briefing on AI, anime, and your favorite creators.

item.title: Jun 13, 2026 — Google DeepMind Releases Gemma 4 AI Models With Frontier-Level Reasoning, Multimodal Capabilities, and Extended Context Windows
item.description: [AI] Google DeepMind Releases Gemma 4 AI Models With Frontier-Level Reasoning, Multimodal Capabilities, and Extended Context Windows — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxPbjBKQzV0bVZObC1CM1JTVDkzcVYyZDI5VHRNSmtWRXVMUEswMTl4Z3pxZ2tNTHMtMHpWTV9NRkowc1h5Rl9wbUhCbHFXdm8wVWxDSVFjOG54aUJ1MXdmN2xEa0toZ2k0MjQxN0drNXdHT2s2S2VYM2hwOXpYYlpMbXdLbEs2YkdMc0RRLUo2Wks?oc=5 [AI] Anthropic Launches Public Version of Mythos and Faces Backlash Over Claude Fable 5 Throttling — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] OpenAI Mulls Steep AI Price Cuts as GPT-5.6 Triggers an AI Price War — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFA3QWZ5WnRzMU5yZEt4UmxKbWJ0Um45VkYyaFBJUVRBQ1JhWkhvb3hwLVJmMkc1emphMDJMZWVaV3dzMGFRenA2VzB5amxDSjNsRzBaaDZsTlBwNUhJWlB0NA?oc=5 [AI] NVIDIA Blackwell Leads on First Agentic AI Infrastructure Benchmark — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxNTzlCUENpZ0ZzMVFZSDV1NnlMSVlSZ2ZHOFR3YmRtWWk0cl9XS0dmV0toTFdESmNEa2JFQUNuS0o0Y3lZNnM2OE5zM1hhNElTWW9zMWxWSmJGUmdETjZGSFZ5NVV6NGMzMWQ5a2pXUGtqQjktZmJ3WDhqb1FmcW9YN3RjTQ?oc=5 [AI] Meta Unveils Muse Spark AI Model and First Output From Its Costly Superintelligence Team — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMicEFVX3lxTE1RM1I4a1dtT29wLWx1RUthQnU4YkJRUVQ3czB2Q3VZcnNNZ05yUmJ1RFdYZlJ4VVg2QlBRcGdwUzlNTTJ6V1FHUXB5cy1ZLVRsU0tIVHFJZk1SdGozNUhhM0hIOThRdTAteHRLcS01MUc?oc=5 [AI] Kimi AI Releases Open-Source K2.7 Code Model With 1 Trillion Parameters; Moonshot Launches Kimi Work Desktop Agent — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMib0FVX3lxTFBWUkotc1lxTmpBdFJtaUVOUmpkOF9wOTNVOGwzdENCZjkybkR3RlRHbnFxd2hpRWhlQ0gwaWlGR01wOERTT3pKRzd3Mk5WWUxpaWllRW51Q25aNzR3VFNOS0h2eDJFR0RGOXcwWHVzcw?oc=5 [Anime] The Apothecary Diaries Announces Season 3 & Original Story Movie for December 2026 — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUEFVX3lxTE5QQi1qZDdtZVpxOGltV1k3RFRWQkh6Q1V1aUVmWWkwWTV2VmYzTVpOZy1pRGlibzFVcXNhcm9JTWMwNU1aa0tXM1RZaE5vSVNP?oc=5 [Anime] Bandai Namco and Sony Announce Strategic Partnership to Expand Anime and Manga — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUEFVX3lxTE1ydnFTRFFUeFM0eW9LRGdNU0dlOVJjaGQ0a1UwT2NiTlp6a2N0MzBWVjlYdDRrZ0YzUU8tUkRHTnU1dmdYd1I0RERhekI1X0ts?oc=5 [Anime] Gintama Creator Hideaki Sorachi's Debut Short Story "Dandelion" Gets Netflix Anime Adaptation — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUEFVX3lxTE1jeGtjR1VYWERrLWZPa0d4YTN3S1djUkIxX3VZNFJldFZkTWhuV0o1bWdRYjlsLURmb2xpN2NhdUkwVzEyR0IyS3JScnFkb09a?oc=5 [Anime] Mushoku Tensei Season 3 Announces "Eris Training Arc" PV, Premiering in July — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUEFVX3lxTE1MVXRYcTZOWnRGdDFZb0REVFNJUHRhUnBrQ2YxVWhqQnJHR2FuN09KUlVlNF9TUjRlU1lxaGk5al9FRjZ3aEFkbnZZTm8ycFFt?oc=5 [Anime] Makoto Shinkai Teases New Animated Film for 2026 — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUEFVX3lxTE4ycXptT2ZiZGI3d0k3cFYzVlZKWmdfRXFNRUFZQ0dyNHowT2RfdzBKcnpELUo4aG9paThXekljNWpHQ0xKdU9ZVld4N2FEUWFH?oc=5 [Anime] Naoki Urasawa (Monster) Launches New Manga Series on August 12 — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxQNWx1c0QtUENGR1U2UDJSaER4aVY5LWRPbm5wdEYtdUhRSlRpZ2g4U3ZFUENpUU9FbzlUVi11bFJmMTdUMXZwQXNmX1N0YTVTWk5IZTVPdDBoSE5BRzFxek1wM3VjQXd5d284RmpUUDVVRUduTFZuY2VlbXdiZm5WakJpUGxBbGZyd3pCWTMyZnJnbzNUanEyTkJjVTAybzR1al9uRzhkLTlKaFlKYTJZWl92S3ZWdGtRWEE?oc=5

item.title: Jun 12, 2026 — Anthropic Releases Claude Fable 5 Amid Safety and Backlash Drama
item.description: [AI] Anthropic Releases Claude Fable 5 Amid Safety and Backlash Drama — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxQT0dBSDkxQU9FamFvM3VsdTlGOHlWa3YyaGllTkRsb1JYR2NQRWlBb01FZlNTYzVVb3NjTW16QjZfcHBkbUZhZWdRc2xQUXVzTkxlV0RxaUtDNTc0d2VpMWtlcDRMb3FnS254RVVLSFdUX0pmekpiZldLOFJlUjBsdlBhUHJ1YVRNY0g4NHJleHcyeUI0dm5pLWgyb2pNRENQT1E?oc=5 https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxPaFpMYXpqS0JjazBFdlpKbVdJT2xiR1hGNmFEUUNyaG10a0dpNW00X2N5NEdycDJMMzFrNzZXR0RZcy1HMmZIaHJLMWNfTnRDZW52bmVwT18xZ0JFbEF5ME5taVg4N2NfQjJuYVphT2VBM25yXzR6ZkxZd04zOUpINVNQNkdBdw?oc=5 Aspar of the Star Chaser" — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUEFVX3lxTE45VDZvN1VNcjFLTGo1bFptZTR2R3BvVVFRb1M5ME13VWJSdHJ6WWlTUmVLSzBhbWdhWVNNNU1QVkE5Q3l6d2RUZ2llSXBzazA0?oc=5 [Anime] New Dragon Ball Super Galactic Patrol Anime Confirmed, Featuring Story and Character Designs by the Late Akira Toriyama — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUEFVX3lxTFBzVFBrSnRJV252MjQzTXFnc19yT1Nkd2pjQnl1Wm1ldnpDUmdwaktTQWVIeXUwaGdRaS15TDNfX2NLNnIxNFI0T1pobVlLN1F4?oc=5 [Anime] "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball July 6 Premiere in New Trailer — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxNOElaWkJ1cE1xZmZxMFNXakVldzFNRHJjam1GSmRWMDVNN2xFNlJjZjV4U1ZUUy01NWNfQk05TVVyVHkzSm80bkNoY1NXaHZfTWNGZ0JkTzBFZWdRMElmZTd0VkZBemllU0xWS0xlZUg4MHEzdGhpZGFKQ3JLemxVV2IwVmxuc3c1cS1SdmZvblZSSkUxeHZFVW1oVkF6R3NLSGdQZHpoOWJ4ZHVfQVA5OFlzUndoZS1z?oc=5 item.title: Jun 11, 2026 — Anthropic Releases Mythos-Class Claude Fable 5 AI Model
item.description: [AI] Anthropic Releases Mythos-Class Claude Fable 5 AI Model — Open-Source DiffusionGemma Model — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] OpenAI Considers Price Cuts to Compete with Anthropic — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] Meta Delays New AI Model Release for Developers
